com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXAttributes


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXAttributes
    This will maintain the strings for all the exposed attributes to have ease in programming plugins.

    For example, to add "19" as fill pattern on IXAttributeSetter, instead of having addAttribute("FillPattern", "19") you can have addAttribute(IXAttributes.GraphicFillPattern, XGraphicLineStyle.XPATTERN_MEDIUM_HORIZONTAL.getName());

    The attributes GraphicFillBackgroundColor, GraphicFillForegroundColor and GraphicFillPattern are applicable only for closed objects i.e polygon, circle, rectangle and group which has closed shape.
